Origin · 起源

THE
PHILOSOPHY

In classical Japanese aesthetics, Yūgen (幽玄) describes something no Western language holds — the profound, mysterious sense of the beauty of the universe. An awareness of something ineffable. Beautiful. Beyond reach.

This is not another avatar project. YŪGEN is a living mythology — 700 chosen Leaders who will write a story never told in Web3 before.

700Leaders
70Master Keys Minted
June 5Launch · 2026

「物語は選ばれし者のもの。門が開く。俺たちは、次の章を書く。」

— YŪGEN · June 5, 2026
YŪGEN ❀

The Collection · 作品

LEADERS

An ultra-limited genesis collection of 700 NFTs on Ethereum — each a founding Leader of the YŪGEN world. Launching exclusively on OpenSea on June 5, 2026. Preceded by 70 Master Keys, now fully sold out on secondary.

01
Genesis Drop

700 Leaders

Not a crowd. A council. Every holder carries genuine weight in the story. The smallest founding number that ensures real scarcity.

700Total Supply
02
Blockchain

Ethereum · ERC-721

The most proven and liquid chain for premium NFT collections worldwide. Built to the ERC-721 standard for maximum compatibility.

ETHBlockchain
03
Platform

OpenSea Exclusive

Confirmed exclusive launch on OpenSea. Master Keys (70 items) already fully minted and trading on secondary with a 0.65 ETH floor and 5.93 ETH total volume.

June 5Launch Date · 2026
04
Narrative

Living Mythology

Each LEADER is a character in an unfolding community-narrated story — permanently on-chain. The story starts at mint, not somewhere down a roadmap.

LiveStory Engine

Traits & Rarity · 形質

WHAT DEFINES A LEADER

Each LEADER is generated from trait categories rooted in Japanese aesthetics and mythology. Rarity tiers are projected — final data reveals June 5.

⛩
背景 · Haikei
Background

Moonlit forests, burning torii, ash ruins. Each scene anchors the Leader's myth.

Common
面
面 · Men
Mask / Face

Noh masks, oni visages, fox spirits. The rarest Leaders show their true face — unmasked is the highest rarity.

Rare
衣
衣装 · Ishō
Garment

Battle-worn haori to ceremonial furisode. The garment reveals the Leader's order and allegiance.

Uncommon
⚔
武器 · Buki
Weapon / Relic

Katana, scroll, lantern, chain. Each relic carries individual lore attached at mint.

Uncommon
✦
気 · Ki
Aura / Ki

Flame. Ink. Void. Storm. Ki auras exist on fewer than 5% of all Leaders — the mythic tier.

Mythic
家
紋 · Mon
Clan Crest

A hidden crest binding certain Leaders — the foundation of future faction play among the 700.

Rare

The Keys · 鍵

THE MASTER
KEYS

Recognition precedes access. To hold a Master Key is not access — it is acknowledgment.

電
Ionized Key · 電離鍵
Free mint allocation per key. The Gate opens at zero cost — earliest belief rewarded.
安
Stable Key · 安定鍵
Discounted mint — up to 3 Leaders at significant reduction. Guaranteed WL access.
白
Whitelist · 白名単
Priority 30-min window before public. Earned through community participation.
門
Public Gate · 公開門
Public mint at full price — first come, first served until all 700 are claimed.
YGR-MK-0001 · SIGMA PROTOCOL_01
Level 0 Clearance · Not all entry is equal

Why Yūgen · 独自性

WHAT MAKES
THIS DIFFERENT

01
Mythology, not metadata

YŪGEN starts from 13th-century Japanese aesthetic philosophy. Every design decision flows from Yūgen's meaning.

02
700 Leaders. 70 Keys. Both matter.

70 Master Keys (all free, all gone) granted early access to a 700-piece genesis collection. Fundamental scarcity — every LEADER is rare, every holder is a founder, and every key holder helped shape the story before it launched.

03
The story IS the utility

No vague roadmap. Leaders co-create a living mythology that evolves with the community. Story starts at mint.

04
Keys rewarded true believers

All 70 Master Keys minted at 0.00 ETH — free, across three tiers (Hunters, Warriors, Public), limit 1 per wallet. The community that showed up early got in for free. Now they hold keys trading above 0.65 ETH on secondary.

05
Built for 2026, not 2021

The 2026 market rewards quality over quantity. YŪGEN is built for cultural resonance and design integrity.
